title: Cardinal Health Is Setting Up For A Great 2024
text: Cardinal Health is a global healthcare company that operates in over 40 countries and covers pharmaceutical distribution and medical products. Based on strong Q1 earnings, the Company is growing on multiple fronts. In addition, cost mitigation is starting to drive results in widening margins. With a price target of $115 and mitigated risks, CAH is a buy.
